---
title: "FINALEXAM123PART3"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
#a)
head(diamonds, 6)
quantile(diamonds$carat, c(0,0.25,0.5,0.75,1))
#b)
boxplot(diamonds$table~diamonds$cut, xlab = "Diamond Cut", ylab = "amount of diamonds in this range", main = "Measuring Amounts of Each diamond cut")
#c)
ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = cut, y = table)) + geom_boxplot() + labs(x = "Diamond Cut", y = "amount of diamonds in this range", title = "Measuring Amounts of Each diamond cut")
#d)
quantile(diamonds$price, c(0.05, 0.95))
#e)
ggplot(diamonds, aes(x = price)) + geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density))) + geom_density(col = "red")
#f)
qqnorm(diamonds$price)
qqline(diamonds$price)
#it does not appear normal. It does not fit the straight line
```
